infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to take photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to select photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app needs permission to save photos and videos to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone for video recording and voice input.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs your location for nearby features and map services.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses your location for continuous location-based services.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: This app uses Face ID for secure authentication.
infoPlist.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: This app needs access to your documents folder to upload files.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow HuggitHub to access your camera for taking photos and videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow HuggitHub to access your microphone for video recording.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow HuggitHub to access your photos for sharing and uploads.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow HuggitHub to access your camera to take photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow HuggitHub to access your photos and videos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow HuggitHub to save photos and videos to your device.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow HuggitHub to use your location for nearby features.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow HuggitHub to use Face ID for secure authentication.
